fundamentals.name: Lumentum Holdings Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. manufactures and sells optical and photonic products in the Americas, the Asia-Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. It operates through two segments, Cloud & Networking and Industrial Tech. The Cloud & Networking segment offers optical and photonic chips, components, modules, and subsystems supplied to cloud data center operators, AI/ML infrastructure providers, and network equipment manufacturer customers that are building cloud data centers and network infrastructures. Its Industrial Tech segment provides short-pulse solid-state lasers, kilowatt-class fiber lasers, diode lasers, and gas lasers that serves the semiconductor device, solar cell, display, and electric vehicle and battery manufacturing markets. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. exhibits exceptionally strong growth metrics and robust profitability, albeit with a high valuation and significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 4.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-05.
positives: Revenue growth 90.1% YoY and analyst estimates of 236.6% for the current quarter and 300.7% for the fiscal year indicate explosive top-line expansion.
Operating margin of 21.8% and profit margin of 17.7% demonstrate strong profitability from its core business.
Return on equity at 22.8% suggests effective use of shareholder capital.
Forward P/E of 53.29, while high, is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 169.51 and supported by a PEG ratio of 0.63, indicating growth is priced in.
Consensus analyst rating is 'buy' with a mean target price of $1104.68, suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 169.51 and Price/Sales of 30.16 indicate a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 111.44 and total debt exceeding total cash suggest significant financial leverage.
Free cash flow of $93.35M TTM appears low relative to the company's market capitalization and debt levels.
Beta of 1.53 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (LITE) has seen recent news highlighting its significant stock appreciation, with one report noting a 635.5% gain over six months and another mentioning it as a featured stock by Zacks. Additionally, new ETFs tracking the ticker have launched, and the company announced an artist residency program. While the company's fundamentals suggest strong growth prospects, the diverse nature of the news, ranging from financial performance to artistic initiatives and new financial products, offers a mixed signal.
